framework.name: Agent Identity Management System (AIMS)
framework.description: Conceptual model (not product) defining 7+ functions: agent identifiers, credentials, attestation, credential provisioning, authentication (transport + application layer via mTLS, WIMSE Proof Tokens, HTTP Message Signatures), authorization (OAuth 2.0 delegation), monitoring/observability, compliance, and policy. Explicitly covers human-in-the-loop, cross-domain access, and transaction tokens for risk reduction.
framework.raw_quote: An Agent Identity Management System ensures that the right Agent has access to the right resources and tools at the right time for the right reason.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
